title: Terral Floripa
description: Web app that helps Florianópolis surfers pick the best beach to surf right now or in the next few days — given current swell direction, wind, and tide. Productizes the local judgment surfers do manually every morning by cross-referencing forecast tools.

title: Blockdaemon Portal
description: Institutional-grade interface to manage, monitor, and deploy blockchain infrastructure. Serves as a central hub for node operations, staking rewards, API management, and asset security at scale. Includes Stripe checkout, wallet integrations (WalletConnect, MetaMask), KYB via Sumsub, feature toggles, and an admin dashboard.

title: Blockdaemon Design System
description: Internal design system built on Mantine 8 with a brand-new visual identity delivered by a third-party design agency. Covers theming, component overrides, design tokens, dark/light theme implementation, and documentation — used across all Blockdaemon web products.

title: Mercado Envios – Mercury WMS
description: UI for Mercury, Mercado Libre's proprietary warehouse management system powering fulfillment centers, cross-docking hubs, and last-mile logistics across Latin America. Built interfaces for logistics managers covering inbound/outbound operations, inventory management, route optimization, and real-time stock synchronization — handling millions of transactions during peak events like Black Friday.

title: GeekHunter
description: Curated marketplace connecting companies with vetted software developers and tech professionals across Latin America. Streamlines tech hiring through pre-selected candidates, advanced filtering, and direct communication tools.
